creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Dennis Friedrichsen from comment #0)

The clk_fixed4 messages are not important.

THe message that is important is the:

man_reserve_resource_bound: attempted to allocate an empty range

where:

man_reserve_resource_bound was
called from nexus_alloc_resource which was
called from ram_attach
